APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHELE AYALA'S HEARING ON WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED PURSUANT TO APPLICATION FILED. MICHELE AYALA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: V.
